## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content creation, product integration, and process updates for Biologica's blog and marketing efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New content cluster focusing on ingredients and their combinations is prioritized](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Updates to content artifacts and review processes are ongoing, with feedback from multiple team members](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Technical integrations for Shopify and image creation are in progress](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Product card placement in blog posts needs clarification from the dev team](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation and Prioritization

  - [New cluster of ingredient-focused content for the blog](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Content should be informational, keyword-focused, and slightly editorialized](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [K2, D3, and calcium topics to be added to the postmenopause cluster](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Two-week buffer maintained for content delivery, incorporating feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=144.0)

### Ingredient Integration and Grouping

  - [Emphasis on deliberate combination of ingredients for effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Logic flow being built into the content pipeline for automatic ingredient integration](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Importance of grouping ingredients (e.g., L-theanine and GABA) highlighted](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=287.0)

### Content Review and Feedback

  - [Dossier updates expected in the coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=506.0)
  - [Brand marketing team member reviewing artifacts for additional input](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Liz (co-founder) reviewing articles for tone and creating a list of do's and don'ts](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=585.0)
  - [Nancy's mom reviewing current menopause content](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [Maggie focusing on regulatory review for email content next week](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)

### Email and Website Copy

  - [Team creating a document expanding on do's and don'ts for tone](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Final copy (post-regulatory review) to be shared for AI analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=756.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [Shopify integration ticket in next engineering sprint](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [Image spec being developed by Katia (design engineer)](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Font files shared for use in image creation](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [Product card integration needs clarification from dev team](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### Upcoming Assets

  - [Photo shoot scheduled for September 3rd-5th, with assets available \~2 weeks after](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1365.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to follow up with dev team about product card integration](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Brian to ensure font files are accessible to the GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1313.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue delivering content batches and incorporating feedback](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Katia to develop image spec using provided brand guidelines and fonts](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
  - [Team to finalize and share the expanded do's and don'ts document for tone](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement linking strategy for content once developed](https://fathom.video/share/Pd8HcdDGizXDG3xMh1T2yHbHGCsz7tCA?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)
